RearCameraFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Not supported now
ReceiptPrint - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Receipt printing for current command, default as "3 – Both merchant /customer copy":
0 – no receipt
1 - merchant only
2 - customer only
3 - Both merchant /customer copy
ReceiptPrintFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
Receipt printing for current command, default as “0 – No receipt”:
RecordNum - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchRequest

The log index in terminal.
RecordNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
The Number of the Current Record.
RecordType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.TORResponseInfo
0 – Reversal record
1 – EMV 2nd GAC Reversal
